ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso3_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude */,
  "region" TEXT /* The region to which the country belongs */,
  "population" TEXT /* The population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* The area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* The capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the environmental metric */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of environmental data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the environmental value */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* The methodology used to collect the data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* The confidence level of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of environmental data */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., satellite, ground measurement) */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* The name of the contact person at the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* The email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the contact person */,
  "website" TEXT /* The website of the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* A score indicating the reliability of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data to which the comment refers */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* The reason the comment was flagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* The type of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_aggregations" (
  "aggregation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregation entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the aggregated data */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value of the collected data */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total count of data entries for the year */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the collected data */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the collected data */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median value of the collected data */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the collected data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Result status of the check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the quality check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the quality check */,
  "check_method" TEXT /* The method used for the quality check */,
  "check_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the quality check process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used for visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* The name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* A description of the visualization */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Indicates if the visualization is shared with other users */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups with whom the visualization is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import log */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source from which data was imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the data import */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, error) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message, if any, during import */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the import */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* The type of import (e.g., CSV, API) */,
  "import_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the import process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export log */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date of the data export */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the exported data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the export process */,
  "exported_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the export */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* The type of export (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "export_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the export process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_exported_by FOREIGN KEY ("exported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
